channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CNN commentator questions Bernie Sanders' outsider status
item.description: A CNN pundit argued that Sanders, with 45 years in office, should be considered part of the establishment.

item.title: Don't Exempt Seniors from Property Taxes
item.description: They already receive government benefits, and younger families would bear the cost.

item.title: Giorgia Meloni Emerges as a Champion for Western Unity
item.description: No Western leader grasps our shared cultural heritage more deeply than the Italian prime minister.

item.title: Trump admin deports criminal migrant pardoned by Tim Walz
item.description: The Trump administration said it revoked legal status and deported a migrant whom Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz had tried to shield from removal by granting...
